mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, project_id, name, description, quarter, color, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM epics WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO epics (tenant_id, project_id, name, description, quarter, color, status) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{e.projectId}, #{e.name}, #{e.description}, #{e.quarter}, #{e.color}, #{e.status})
mapper.update: UPDATE epics SET name = #{e.name}, description = #{e.description}, quarter = #{e.quarter}, color = #{e.color}, status = #{e.status} WHERE id = #{e.id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM epics WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
DELETE FROM epics WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
